item.title: FFS people do better!! Support each other! FFS the world is hard enough without caring about each other's genders! Let people be who they were born to be, stop caring about their genitals!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Anime Expo Day 1 Vlog - YuzuPyon
item.description: Hello everyone! I was afk for some time as I was travelling to Los Angeles to attend Anime Expo 2024 ! I attend this event every year, but I thought that I would share my experience with you for once :D I thought it would be interesting for you to see what a day in my life as a professional cosplayer might look like at such events. On Day 1 I didn't have much planned so I visited my friend's meet ups then guested at my first after party of the week end (spoiler alert there is one every night hahaha) On Day 2 things will pick up a little as I got meet and greets, photoshoots and another after party guesting at night. Are you interested to see the second day? Have a good day all! Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: The craziest thing I've ever seen a Manatee do
item.description: I've seen Manatees do some strange or crazy things over the years. This was a group of 3 manatees that were following me as I was trying to back away. They followed me like this for about half a mile. At one point, one of them got right under the kayak and rolled over twice while in motion. I didn't even know a Manatee was capable of doing that while moving forward. I was pretty psyched when National Geographic purchased a copy of the video from me. I think it was the first video I ever sold to Nat Geo. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check out my gallery at https://imgur.com/user/SeeThroughCanoe/posts or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.title: Images of Note: it's dere
item.description:
Valid to eat fingers
Eva by Nightwish, Rose for Epona by Eluveitie, My Immortal by Evanescence, Life Eternal by Ghost, put more in the comments.
Life is boring, dress like a fucking JoJo Character.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii It's true
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii For legal reasons this is a joke
THIS
Hell yeah
Not from a neurotypical
This is what dreaming would look like if you could record it.
To be fair, if I saw a Pikachu only I could understand speaking to me with amnesia I think the fact it sounds like my Dad would be the least of my concerns.
You can get jail time for sleeping on a park bench but not for trying to overthrow the government in America. Also child marriage is legal in parts of America and is actively and openly being defended in State legislatures.
Chan eil fios agam mu sibhse, dh' thuigsinn mi a h-uile rud ann am bhidio sin.
Thor is amazing
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
so comfortable
mmm hmm
love vice city but san andreas is the best
not much of a video call person
let's gooo
people love when you scan them
someone's never seen the Free Willy series
wait.. back up
you can do this with a lot of devices?
fire away.. if you want
that's a nope
i love weed and seth but yeah..
i knew it
we've all sold teeth at one point or another
what's the rarest fish i can invest in??
i think this is a real ad from way long ago
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Birds of a feather ...
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: Starting the weekend off right with a nice Saturday dump
item.description:
I always ask my wife if she wants to hate me when I put something big in my pockets. Last weekend was comic con. I carried a whole-ass nalgene bottle in one of my pockets.
I need to get me a sword. Good thing ren faire is next weekend.
Idk, it was 105° yesterday and I sure as hell didn't feel like committing any crimes that didn't involve cold showers and AC.
That's the great thing about lazy coworkers: they make the rest of us look really good by comparison.
These are the kind of things they don't teach you in American history classes.
I'd go to this wedding in a heartbeat.
Merry Christmas in July, everyone
Ziti the Kenyan sand boa tax. Thank you all for stopping by, and I hope you enjoyed or suffered appropriately.
item.dc:creator: RomeoZeroRomeo

item.title: "I Didn't Want to Ruin a Good Dog"
item.description: John Steinbeck portrait: Public Domain Steinbeck in 1939 By McFadden Publications, Inc.; no photographer credited - Photoplay, November 1939 (page 22)Photograph is flipped horizontally for magazine publication, Public Domain, https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=105375118 Sauce: Carmen Bredeson, American Writers of the 20th Century (Springfield, NJ: Enslow Publications, Inc., 1996), p. 53. “John Ernst Steinbeck (February 27, 1902 – December 20, 1968) was an American writer. He won the 1962 Nobel Prize in Literature ‘for his realistic and imaginative writings, combining as they do sympathetic humor and keen social perception’. He has been called ‘a giant of American letters.’ “During his writing career, he authored 33 books, with one book coauthored alongside Edward Ricketts, including 16 novels, six non-fiction books, and two collections of short stories. He is widely known for the comic novels Tortilla Flat (1935) and Cannery Row (1945), the multi-generation epic East of Eden (1952), and the novellas The Red Pony (1933) and Of Mice and Men (1937). The Pulitzer Prize–winning The Grapes of Wrath(1939) is considered Steinbeck's masterpiece and part of the American literary canon. By the 75th anniversary of its publishing date, it had sold 14 million copies.” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Steinbeck For More Information: Do a Web search for “John Steinbeck’s dog Toby” Many articles will appear.
item.dc:creator: oukid
